# Data overview

## Data load

The analysis dataset loaded below is the prepared nestling-level file used by all model-fitting and figure-generation scripts.

```{r}
#| label: data-overview-load
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false

analysis_file <- "data/prepared_nestlings.rds"
analysis_data <- readRDS(analysis_file)

data.frame(
  file = analysis_file,
  rows = nrow(analysis_data),
  columns = ncol(analysis_data)
)
```

## Variable names in the analysis file

The table below documents the variables retained in the prepared analysis dataset.

```{r}
#| label: overview-variable-dictionary
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

analysis_file <- "data/prepared_nestlings.rds"
analysis_data <- readRDS(analysis_file)

abbreviations_raw <- read_excel(
  "CF_exp_all_2026.xlsx",
  sheet = "ABBREVIATIONS",
  col_names = FALSE
)

source_dictionary <- data.frame(
  variable = abbreviations_raw[[1]],
  meaning = abbreviations_raw[[3]],
  check.names = FALSE
) |>
  filter(!is.na(variable))

derived_dictionary <- data.frame(
  variable = c(
    "BS_sc",
    "incubation_temperature_sc",
    "nestling_temperature_sc",
    "Early.g",
    "Late.g",
    "Growth",
    "D12_SMI"
  ),
  meaning = c(
    "Standardised brood size used as a covariate in the mixed models.",
    "Standardised incubation-period temperature measured by temperature loggers, derived from LOGMEAN_INCUBATION.",
    "Standardised nestling-period temperature measured by temperature loggers, derived from LOGMEAN_NESTLING.",
    "Nestling growth rate between day 2 and day 8 of life.",
    "Nestling growth rate between day 8 and day 12 of life.",
    "Nestling growth rate across the full measured period, from day 2 to day 12 of life.",
    "Day-12 scaled mass index derived from day-12 body mass and day-12 tarsus length."
  ),
  check.names = FALSE
)

variable_dictionary <- data.frame(variable = names(analysis_data), check.names = FALSE) |>
  left_join(source_dictionary, by = "variable") |>
  rows_update(derived_dictionary, by = "variable", unmatched = "ignore") |>
  mutate(meaning = if_else(is.na(meaning), "Not described in the source abbreviations sheet.", meaning))

kable(variable_dictionary, col.names = c("Variable name", "Meaning"))
```
